bayi.name: Dealer Management
bayi.description: AI + WhatsApp dealer sales portal for Turkish distributors
bayi.value_subtitle: Your assistant upu turns WhatsApp messages from dealers into orders, tracks payment terms and manages your field team. Keep using Logo/Yuki/Exact — we just replace the dealer-facing layer.
bayi.value_1_desc: Dealer types '5 boxes of paint please' — AI extracts product, quantity, price; asks for your approval. 30 seconds from message to order.
bayi.value_2_desc: Three days before due date a friendly nudge, on the day a reminder, after that firmer — all with your approval before reaching the dealer.
bayi.value_3_desc: Regional manager types 'my route' in the morning — AI sorts dealers by due date + location. Voice visit notes become structured data.
bayi.value_4_desc: New discount, new product, seasonal campaign — personalized WA message to all dealers, automatic tracking. Not email blast — 95%+ open rate.
bayi.value_5_desc: Yuki, Exact, SnelStart, Logo NL — whichever you use, we read it. Customer ledger, invoices, payments flow without errors.
bayi.pricing_growth_desc: Distributor with team (up to 100 dealers, field reps incl.)
bayi.pricing_pro_desc: Unlimited dealers + all integrations + priority support
bayi.referral_banner: 🎁 First {count} customers: free setup + 3 months at half price
